title: Treatment of cholera - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of cholera
Learn how  cholera is diagnosed  and treated.
- How is cholera diagnosed?
- How is cholera treated?

## How is cholera diagnosed?
Cholera is diagnosed by identification of the bacteria in a stool sample.

## How  is cholera treated?
Cholera is easily treatable.
If you have  diarrhea:
- the most  important treatment is to drink plenty of fluids to prevent dehydration
- use oral rehydration solutions as soon as possible to replace liquids lost  through diarrhea
If you have  symptoms of cholera and are treated right away, the illness is rarely fatal.
Severely  dehydrated individuals may need administration of intravenous fluids.
In moderate  and severe cases, antibiotics can help to shorten the length and severity of  the illness.
